opinions.title: Use Form Status
opinions.body: Use Form Status is a great hook, it will inherit form status from parent so we do not need to make Submit for each form

opinions.title: Form Handling
opinions.body: I am learing new hooks for forms like useAction and useFormStatus , though useFormStatus is from  React Dom

opinions.title: React hooks
opinions.body: I need to learn more about react hooks

opinions.title: Do yourself a favor and learn React!
opinions.body:
React is an amazing JavaScript library!

Despite all it's shortcomings.

opinions.title: React has more depth than you might first think!
opinions.body:
React is a great library to learn, but it's not just about the basics. Dive deeper!
For example with this course!
